creator: ykasap@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 145763
patch file to make mail/mailagent non-interactive port

This patch changed the behavior of sanity tests from the first patch.
In post-build target, when the port is built as root, 
it changes the owner of test directory (agent/test) and
run the test as nobody.
(I borrowed the code from regression-test target of devel/llvm32.)
